doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The State Bar of California has no such protocol, and its purported waiver of UPL under B&P §6125 and elimination of pre-filing attorney supervision contradict established California law and exceed the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission's
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The State Bar of California has no such protocol; the document purports to waive UPL under B&P §6125 and eliminate pre-filing attorney supervision, which the State Bar lacks authority to do and contradicts established California law.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The State Bar of California has no such protocol, and its purported waiver of UPL under B&P §6125 and elimination of pre-filing attorney supervision contradict established California law and exceed the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission's authority.
